# accessflow_routing_policy (Resource)

An attribute-based routing policy (auto-approve / auto-reject / require N approvals / escalate).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "accessflow_routing_policy" "block_deletes" {
  name     = "block-deletes-off-hours"
  priority = 100
  action   = "AUTO_REJECT"
  reason   = "DELETE statements are never auto-approved"

  # The typed condition tree, as JSON.
  condition = jsonencode({
    type   = "query_type"
    any_of = ["DELETE"]
  })
}

resource "accessflow_routing_policy" "escalate_high_risk" {
  name               = "escalate-high-risk"
  priority           = 200
  action             = "REQUIRE_APPROVALS"
  required_approvals = 2
  condition = jsonencode({
    type     = "risk_level"
    any_of   = ["HIGH", "CRITICAL"]
  })
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) `AUTO_APPROVE`, `AUTO_REJECT`, `REQUIRE_APPROVALS`, or `ESCALATE`.
- `condition` (String) The typed condition tree as a JSON object string.
- `name` (String)
- `priority` (Number) Lower numbers evaluate first.

### Optional

- `datasource_id` (String) Scope to a single datasource; omit for org-wide.
- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `reason` (String)
- `required_approvals` (Number) Required when action is `REQUIRE_APPROVALS` or `ESCALATE`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `organization_id` (String)
